stories.name: Implement workspace/state.json cross-session continuity and /checkpoint convention
Deploy assurance agent as automated CI gate on PR open/update
Implement watermark gate for eval regression detection
Implement versioned skill distribution and progressive skill disclosure
Implement surface adapter model foundations â€” Path B git-native reference

epics.name: Standards, Eval Suite, and Compliance Documentation

stories.name: Implement workspace/suite.json living eval regression suite
Implement standards model Phase 1 â€” three anchor disciplines, standards/index.yml, POLICY.md floors
Author and review MODEL-RISK.md before non-dogfood adoption
stories.acNotes: AC3 requires real trace evidence from a story run through the P1.3 CI gate — cannot be completed until next delivery cycle

guardrails.label: No user-supplied content in innerHTML without sanitisation
guardrails.evidence: No viz/DOM changes in any Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No credentials, tokens, or personal data in committed files
guardrails.evidence: NFRs across p1.6, p1.7, p1.8 explicitly exclude credentials/PII; p1.3 Architecture Constraints reference product constraint #12 (credential names only in CI config). No violations found across 8 stories.

guardrails.label: Viz reads local JSON only â€” no external fetch calls
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate logic reads evidence fields from pipeline-state.json (not stage alone)
guardrails.evidence: No new gate logic introduced in stories reviewed. P1.4 watermark gate and P1.3 CI gate stories do not define viz gate logic â€” that is existing viz scope, not story deliverable.

guardrails.label: Fields written to pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json schema fields introduced in stories reviewed (p1.6, p1.7, p1.8 all content-only)

guardrails.label: Fields read by viz from pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json fields read by viz introduced in stories reviewed

guardrails.label: pipeline-viz.html renders without build step, server, or network
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No npm devDependencies in pipeline-viz.html runtime
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Stage enum in schema updated when skill adds/removes stage
guardrails.evidence: No new stages added or removed in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate add/remove synced with SKILL.md criteria
guardrails.evidence: No new governance gates added or removed in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Interactive elements keyboard-accessible
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Colour not sole indicator of gate status (icons/labels present)
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Single-file viz, no build step
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gates must use evidence fields, not stage-proxy
guardrails.evidence: No new gate logic in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Schema-first: fields defined before use
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json schema fields introduced in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: context.yml is the single config source of truth
guardrails.evidence: p1.3 Architecture Constraints explicitly requires CI config to use context.yml secret names, not hardcoded values. No skill file hardcoding found across 8 stories.

guardrails.label: Single-file HTML viz architecture
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: State access via parsed pipelineState global
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate pass/fail by evidence fields
guardrails.evidence: No new gate logic introduced; existing gate pattern not violated by story scope

guardrails.label: Schema evolution: add fields simultaneously
guardrails.evidence: No schema evolution in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Config reading via context.yml
guardrails.evidence: No new skill config reading introduced in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate logic checking feature.stage only
guardrails.evidence: No new gate logic introduced

guardrails.label: Hardcoded org/tool names in skill files
guardrails.evidence: No skill file content changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: External CDN dependencies in viz at runtime
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Fields used by viz/skills but not in schema
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json fields introduced in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Committing viz changes without passing check-viz-syntax.js
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in Phase 1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Directly mutating pipeline-state.json outside skills
guardrails.evidence: No story deliverable requires direct pipeline-state.json mutation outside skill execution

guardrails.label: /checkpoint write completes within 60 seconds
guardrails.evidence: Multiple /checkpoint invocations during Phase 1 dogfood run (2026-04-09 to 2026-04-11). All sessions completed without hanging — confirmed by commit history. MM3 sub-condition 1 confirmed met at DoD (2026-04-11).

guardrails.label: state.json must not contain credentials, PAT tokens, or secrets
guardrails.evidence: Automated test nfr-state-json-no-credentials passes. workspace/state.json inspected — contains only pipeline metadata (phases, artefact paths, timestamps). No credential patterns found. Confirmed at DoD (2026-04-11).

guardrails.label: Each phase section in state.json includes lastUpdated timestamp
guardrails.evidence: Automated test nfr-state-json-audit-lastUpdated-present passes. Live workspace/state.json verified: lastUpdated present at ISO 8601. Confirmed at DoD (2026-04-11).

guardrails.label: Watermark gate completes within 2 minutes (component of 10-min gate budget)
guardrails.evidence: AC scope is TSV read + comparison + append; no network calls; test plan NFR test nfr-gate-completes-within-10-minutes covers timeout; DoR passed â€” enforcement deferred to DoD verify-completion

guardrails.label: results.tsv contains no credentials, secrets, or PII â€” scores, hashes, timestamps only
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR security section explicit; coding agent instructions block prohibits secrets; data classification confirmed Internal

guardrails.label: results.tsv rows are never deleted or modified â€” append-only audit history
guardrails.evidence: AC2/AC3/AC5 tests verify append behaviour; story NFR audit section explicit; referenced in product constraint #5 (two-layer model)

guardrails.label: Assembled copilot-instructions.md base layer â‰¤8,000 tokens at session-start (outer loop phase only)
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR section explicit; AC3/AC5 test assembled file structure; enforcement deferred to DoD token count measurement

guardrails.label: Distribution mechanism config references credential names only â€” no credential values or PAT tokens in committed files
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR security section explicit; coding agent instructions block enforces constraint #12; data classification confirmed Internal

guardrails.label: Assembly composition order and source versions readable from assembled file header
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR audit section explicit; AC5 tests header contains platform version reference; AC5 unit tests assert layer order documented

guardrails.label: Path B surface type resolution completes within 1 second
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR performance section explicit; DoR passed â€” enforcement deferred to DoD verify-completion

guardrails.label: git-native adapter must not log, persist, or transmit credential values
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR security section explicit; credential-pattern test in test plan; coding agent instructions block enforces constraint #12

guardrails.label: result object from adapter includes surface type and adapter version for trace audit
guardrails.evidence: AC1 unit tests assert result.surface echoed; story NFR audit section explicit; coding agent instructions specify result object fields required

guardrails.label: Full suite evaluation completes within 8 minutes (component of 10-minute gate budget)
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR performance section explicit; NFR test N1 in test plan; DoR passed â€” enforcement deferred to DoD verify-completion

guardrails.label: suite.json contains no credentials, secrets, or PII â€” scenario descriptions only
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR security section explicit; NFR test N2 scans for credential patterns; coding agent instructions block explicit

guardrails.label: Every scenario merge has reviewNote field populated â€” null reviewNote is an audit gap
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR audit section explicit; NFR test N3 + unit tests U4/U5 enforce non-null reviewNote; coding agent instructions block explicit

guardrails.label: Standards file injection (read 3 files + compute hashes) completes within 30 seconds
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR performance section explicit; NFR test N1 in test plan; DoR passed â€” enforcement deferred to DoD verify-completion

guardrails.label: security-engineering POLICY.md floor includes: no OWASP high/critical without RISK-ACCEPT; secrets never committed
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR security section explicit; NFR test N2 validates both floor items present as binary requirements; coding agent instructions specify minimum floor content

guardrails.label: Every standards file has lastReviewedBy and lastReviewedDate fields populated
guardrails.evidence: Story NFR audit section explicit; NFR test N3 + integration test I2 enforce review record presence; coding agent instructions block explicit

guardrails.label: MODEL-RISK.md risk descriptions must not enumerate attack surfaces in operational detail (no port numbers, admin endpoints, infrastructure topology)
guardrails.evidence: Story Security NFR explicit: 'risk descriptions must be at a level appropriate for a governance audience, not an attack surface enumeration'; NFR test N1 scans for credential patterns and adversarially useful content; coding agent instructions block explicit; DoR passed â€” enforcement confirmed at DoD security review

guardrails.label: Every substantive MODEL-RISK.md update (risk added, evidence record updated, sign-off appended) committed with traceable commit message naming the change type
guardrails.evidence: Story Audit NFR explicit: 'each substantive update must be committed with a traceable commit message â€” the git history is the audit trail'; NFR test N2 validates commit message traceability; coding agent instructions block sets commit message convention

metrics.name: Cross-session resume via workspace/state.json
metrics.evidence: Multiple natural session boundaries crossed during Phase 1 dogfood run (2026-04-09 to 2026-04-11). Each new session correctly identified the current phase without operator verbal priming. This session (2026-04-11) is itself a clean resume: state.json read first, definition-of-done reported, pendingActions surfaced before operator confirmation. Target: clean resume within 2 natural session boundaries — met.

metrics.name: /checkpoint mid-phase write
metrics.evidence: /checkpoint invoked multiple times across Phase 1 dogfood run. All three sub-conditions observed met: (1) sessions completed within 60s; (2) required fields present — automated tests confirm; (3) subsequent sessions resumed correctly without verbal priming. Target: all three sub-conditions pass within 2 invocations — met.

metrics.name: Update channel latency
metrics.evidence: P1.1 DoD — pull model operational; change present without squad merge step; < 1 session open elapsed
